bug_list.description: transferEventOwnership never verifies that the event exists before inserting or reactivating owner assignments, so a nonexistent event can return ok:true and create orphaned ownership rows.
Automation trigger creation only scopes the template by event and allows channel mismatches, so an email trigger can point at a WhatsApp template.
generateGlobalExport rejects unknown types in all-events mode but not in single-event mode, where arbitrary runtime strings are forwarded to generateExport and returned as successful exports.
importTravelBatch bypasses the travel CSV row schema and imports malformed UTC timestamps instead of returning a row-level validation error.
